svg.title: Sentinel Nexus 4-layer architecture with 11 data sources
svg.desc: Layer 1: 11 sensor types feed through NATS JetStream. Layer 2: LSTM-AE baseline and isolation forest detection. Layer 3: 5-agent LLM swarm with expert routing. Layer 4: DPO/IPO critic and SOAR containment.
svg.text: Sentinel Nexus -- unified data flow (11 data sources)
DuckDB queries from Layer 3 agents read directly from S3 cold storage (Layer 2)
Suricata routes to net expert (rules + archive), not Qdrant. GCP/VMware reuse cloud_flow vector (5D).
